description: 6-axis IMU (3-axis gyroscope + 3-axis accelerometer) with I2C interface

General Config.name: SMPLRT_DIV
General Config.description: Sample rate divider from gyroscope output rate

General Config.name: CONFIG
General Config.description: Configuration register for DLPF and other settings

Self Test.name: SELF_TEST_Y
Self Test.description: Self test register for Y-axis accelerometer and gyroscope

Self Test.name: SELF_TEST_Z
Self Test.description: Self test register for Z-axis accelerometer and gyroscope

Self Test.name: SELF_TEST_A
Self Test.description: Self test register for accelerometer lower bits

Gyroscope.name: GYRO_CONFIG
Gyroscope.description: Triggers gyroscope self-test and configures gyroscopes full scale range

Gyroscope.name: GYRO_XOUT_H
Gyroscope.description: Upper byte of X axis gyroscope measurement

Gyroscope.name: GYRO_XOUT_L
Gyroscope.description: Lower byte of X axis gyroscope measurement

Gyroscope.name: GYRO_YOUT_H
Gyroscope.description: Upper byte of Y axis gyroscope measurement

Gyroscope.name: GYRO_YOUT_L
Gyroscope.description: Lower byte of Y axis gyroscope measurement

Gyroscope.name: GYRO_ZOUT_H
Gyroscope.description: Upper byte of Z axis gyroscope measurement

Gyroscope.name: GYRO_ZOUT_L
Gyroscope.description: Lower byte of Z axis gyroscope measurement

Accelerometer.name: ACCEL_CONFIG
Accelerometer.description: Triggers accelerometer self-test and configures accelerometer full scale range

Accelerometer.name: ACCEL_XOUT_H
Accelerometer.description: High byte of X-axis accelerometer measurement

FIFO.name: FIFO_EN
FIFO.description: Determines which sensor measurements are loaded into the FIFO buffer

FIFO.name: FIFO_COUNT_H
FIFO.description: High byte of FIFO count registers. Shadows FIFO count value, updated when read.

fields.name: FIFO_COUNT
fields.description: FIFO_COUNT[15:8]. Number of bytes stored in the FIFO buffer.

FIFO.name: FIFO_COUNT_L
FIFO.description: Low byte of FIFO count registers. Shadows FIFO count value, updated when FIFO_COUNT_H is read.

fields.name: FIFO_COUNT
fields.description: FIFO_COUNT[7:0]. Number of bytes stored in the FIFO buffer.

FIFO.name: FIFO_R_W
FIFO.description: Used to read and write data from the FIFO buffer.

fields.name: FIFO_DATA
fields.description: 8-bit data transferred to and from the FIFO buffer.

I2C Master.name: I2C_MST_CTRL
I2C Master.description: Configures auxiliary I2C bus for single/multi-master control, delays Data Ready interrupt, enables Slave 3 FIFO, configures slave read transitions and I2C master clock.

fields.name: WAIT_FOR_ES
fields.description: Delays Data Ready interrupt until external sensor data loaded.

fields.name: SLV3_FIFO_EN
fields.description: Enables EXT_SENS_DATA registers for Slave 3 into FIFO.

fields.name: I2C_MST_P_NSR
fields.description: Controls I2C master transition: 0=restart, 1=stop+start between reads.

fields.name: I2C_MST_CLK
fields.description: 4-bit value configures divider on 8MHz clock for I2C master speed.

I2C Master.name: I2C_SLV0_ADDR
I2C Master.description: Specifies I2C slave address for Slave 0.

I2C Master.name: I2C_SLV0_REG
I2C Master.description: Register address within Slave 0 where data transfer starts.

I2C Master.name: I2C_SLV0_CTRL
I2C Master.description: Configures Slave 0 data transfer: enable, byte swap, reg disable, grouping, length.

fields.name: I2C_SLV0_EN
fields.description: Enables Slave 0 for I2C data transaction.

fields.name: I2C_SLV0_BYTE_SW
fields.description: Configures byte swapping of word pairs.

fields.name: I2C_SLV0_REG_DIS
fields.description: Disables register address write before data transaction.

fields.name: I2C_SLV1_RW
fields.description: When set to 1, configures data transfer as read operation. When 0, write operation.

I2C Master.name: I2C_SLV1_CTRL
I2C Master.description: Statistics counter (from manifest, no field details in source)

I2C Master.name: I2C_SLV2_CTRL
I2C Master.description: Statistics counter (from manifest, no field details in source)

I2C Master.name: I2C_SLV0_DO
I2C Master.description: Output data written into Slave 0 when set to write mode.

fields.name: I2C_SLV0_DO
fields.description: 8 bit unsigned value written into Slave 0.

I2C Master.name: I2C_SLV1_DO
I2C Master.description: Output data written into Slave 1 when set to write mode.

fields.name: I2C_SLV1_DO
fields.description: 8 bit unsigned value written into Slave 1.

I2C Master.name: I2C_SLV2_DO
I2C Master.description: Output data written into Slave 2 when set to write mode.

fields.name: I2C_SLV2_DO
fields.description: 8 bit unsigned value written into Slave 2.

I2C Master.name: I2C_SLV3_DO
I2C Master.description: Output data written into Slave 3 when set to write mode.

fields.name: I2C_SLV3_DO
fields.description: 8 bit unsigned value written into Slave 3.

I2C Master.name: I2C_MST_DELAY_CTRL
I2C Master.description: Specify timing of external sensor data shadowing and decrease access rate of slave devices.

fields.name: DELAY_ES_SHADOW
fields.description: Delay shadowing of external sensor data until all data received.

Interrupts.name: INT_PIN_CFG
Interrupts.description: Configures the behavior of the interrupt signals at the INT pins. Also used to enable the FSYNC Pin to be used as an interrupt to the host application processor, as well as to enable Bypass Mode on the I2C Master.

fields.name: INT_LEVEL
fields.description: When 0, INT pin active high. When 1, INT pin active low.

fields.name: INT_OPEN
fields.description: When 0, INT pin push-pull. When 1, INT pin open drain.

fields.name: LATCH_INT_EN
fields.description: When 0, INT pin 50us pulse. When 1, INT pin held until cleared.

fields.name: FSYNC_INT_LEVEL
fields.description: When 0, FSYNC active high. When 1, FSYNC active low.

fields.name: FSYNC_INT_EN
fields.description: When 1, enables FSYNC pin as interrupt to host processor.

fields.name: I2C_BYPASS_EN
fields.description: When 1 and I2C_MST_EN=0, enables direct access to auxiliary I2C bus.

Interrupts.name: INT_ENABLE
Interrupts.description: Enables interrupt generation by interrupt sources.

fields.name: FIFO_OFLOW_EN
fields.description: When set to 1, this bit enables a FIFO buffer overflow to generate an interrupt.

fields.name: I2C_MST_INT_EN
fields.description: When set to 1, this bit enables any of the I^2C Master interrupt sources to generate an interrupt.

fields.name: DATA_RDY_EN
fields.description: When set to 1, this bit enables the Data Ready interrupt, which occurs each time a write operation to all of the sensor registers has been completed.

Interrupts.name: INT_STATUS
Interrupts.description: Shows the interrupt status of each interrupt generation source. Each bit clears after register read.

fields.name: FIFO_OFLOW_INT
fields.description: Sets to 1 when FIFO overflow interrupt generated. Clears after read.

fields.name: I2C_MST_INT
fields.description: Sets to 1 when I2C Master interrupt generated. Clears after read.

fields.name: DATA_RDY_INT
fields.description: Sets to 1 when Data Ready interrupt generated. Clears after read.

Signal Path Control.name: SIGNAL_PATH_RESET
Signal Path Control.description: Reset the analog and digital signal paths of the gyroscope, accelerometer, and temperature sensors.

fields.name: GYRO_RESET
fields.description: Resets the gyroscope analog and digital signal paths

fields.name: ACCEL_RESET
fields.description: Resets the accelerometer analog and digital signal paths

fields.name: TEMP_RESET
fields.description: Resets the temperature sensor analog and digital signal paths

User Control.name: USER_CTRL
User Control.description: Enable/disable FIFO buffer, I2C Master Mode, and primary I2C interface. Reset FIFO, I2C Master, sensor signal paths.

fields.name: I2C_IF_DIS
fields.description: Disables primary I2C interface (MPU-6000) or always 0 (MPU-6050)

fields.name: SIG_COND_RESET
fields.description: Resets signal paths for all sensors

Power Management.name: PWR_MGMT_1
Power Management.description: Configure power mode and clock source. Reset entire device, disable temperature sensor.

fields.name: DEVICE_RESET
fields.description: Resets all internal registers to default values

Power Management.name: PWR_MGMT_2
Power Management.description: Configure wake-up frequency in Accelerometer Only Low Power Mode and put individual axes into standby mode.

fields.name: LP_WAKE_CTRL
fields.description: Specifies the frequency of wake-ups during Accelerometer Only Low Power Mode.

fields.name: STBY_XA
fields.description: Puts the X axis accelerometer into standby mode when set to 1.

fields.name: STBY_YA
fields.description: Puts the Y axis accelerometer into standby mode when set to 1.

fields.name: STBY_ZA
fields.description: Puts the Z axis accelerometer into standby mode when set to 1.

fields.name: STBY_XG
fields.description: Puts the X axis gyroscope into standby mode when set to 1.

fields.name: STBY_YG
fields.description: Puts the Y axis gyroscope into standby mode when set to 1.

fields.name: STBY_ZG
fields.description: Puts the Z axis gyroscope into standby mode when set to 1.

Device ID.name: WHO_AM_I
Device ID.description: Verify device identity. Contains upper 6 bits of 7-bit I2C address. Bits 0 and 7 reserved.

fields.name: WHO_AM_I
fields.description: 6-bit I2C address of the MPU-60X0. Power-On-Reset value is 110100.
